slides.title: Umphakathi Wase-Afrika Wasendulo: IGibhithe
slides.lead: Uhambo phezulu emfuleni iNile ukuze sihlangane nofaro, amaphiramidi nombhalo wezithombe womunye wemiphakathi emidala kunayo yonke e-Afrika.

media.alt: Amaphiramidi amathathu egolide nelanga eliqhakazile liphuma phezu kwehlane eduze komfula oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='250' cy='50' r='26' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='120' width='320' height='60' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='24' width='30' height='180' fill='#4a86b5' opacity='0.85'/><path d='M120 120 L160 52 L200 120 Z' fill='#d8b45a'/><path d='M70 120 L100 74 L130 120 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/><path d='M190 120 L215 82 L240 120 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Buza abafundi ukuthi yini abakade beyazi ngeGibhithe lasendulo - amaphiramidi, ama-mummy, ofaro. Chaza ukuthi iGibhithe lise-Afrika, enyakatho-mpumalanga, nokuthi lena yayingenye yezimpucuko zokuqala emhlabeni, ebuyela emuva eminyakeni engaphezu kuka-5000. 'Impucuko' isho umphakathi omkhulu, ohleliwe onamadolobha, uhulumeni, umbhalo nezinkolelo ezabelwana.

slides.title: Impucuko yase-Afrika, endulo
slides.lead: IGibhithe lasendulo lakhula enyakatho-mpumalanga ye-Afrika eminyakeni engaphezu kuka-5000 eyadlula.

blocks.text: IGibhithe liyizwe elisenyakatho-mpumalanga ye-**Afrika**. Eminyakeni eyizinkulungwane eyadlula, enye yezimpucuko ezinkulu zokuqala emhlabeni yakhula lapha. Yahlala isikhathi eside kakhulu ngoba iGibhithe lalinemingcele yemvelo - amahlane, izilwandle namawa - eyakwenza kwaba nzima ezitheni ukuhlasela.

items: IGibhithe liyingxenye yezwekazi lase-Afrika, eduze koLwandle Olubomvu (Red Sea) noLwandle iMedithera (Mediterranean Sea).
Impucuko yakhula futhi yashintsha phakathi neminyaka eyizinkulungwane.
Sifunda ngayo emanxiweni, emathuneni, emidwebeni nasembhalweni wasendulo.

slides.notes: Qinisa umqondo obalulekile we-CAPS: iGibhithe lingumphakathi wase-Afrika, aliqhelile e-Afrika. Khombisa ebalazweni ukuthi liselezwekazini lethu. Chaza ukuthi izazi-mlando zifunda ngesikhathi esidlule zisebenzisa ubufakazi - lapha lobo bufakazi yizakhiwo, amathuna, imidwebo ezindongeni nombhalo osele. [SME] Qinisekisa ukuthi amagama endawo/ebalazwe afanele i-athlasi yekilasi lakho.

slides.title: Umfula iNile

blocks.text: I-**Nile** ingumfula omkhulu kunayo yonke e-Afrika. Igeleza isuka eningizimu iye enyakatho bese ithela oLwandle iMedithera. Iningi leGibhithe liyihlane elishisayo nelomile, ngakho cishe wonke umuntu wayehlala eduze komfula.

Njalo ehlobo iNile **yayikhukhula** (yayigcwala amanzi ivukuze amasimu). Lapho amanzi ehla futhi, ayeshiya emuva inhlabathi ecebile nemnyama ebizwa ngokuthi *inhlabathi ye-alluvial*. Le nhlabathi yayilungele kahle ukukhulisa izitshalo, ngakho amasimu afanayo ayengalinywa unyaka nonyaka.

items: INile yayinika abantu amanzi okuphuza nawokunisela izitshalo zabo.
Yayingumgwaqo omatasa wezikebhe ezithwala abantu nempahla.
Isikhukhula sonyaka sasenza inhlabathi ivunde ukuze kulinywe.

media.alt: Umfula oluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka ugeleza phakathi kwamasimu aluhlaza nehlane eliphuzi nhlangothi zombili.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#e8d9a8'/><rect x='104' width='32' height='160' fill='#4a86b5'/><rect x='80' width='24' height='160' fill='#7a8b5a'/><rect x='136' width='24' height='160' fill='#7a8b5a'/><circle cx='40' cy='36' r='16' fill='#e8a13a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Lena yinhliziyo yesihloko: ijografi yabumba yonke into. Chaza umjikelezo wesikhukhula ngendlela elula - amanzi asibekela amasimu, bese ehla ashiye udaka olusha olwenza izitshalo zikhule kahle. Ngaphandle kweNile, iGibhithe lonke lalizoba yihlane. Buza: kungani cishe wonke umuntu wayehlala eduze komfula?

slides.title: Ukuphila nokusebenza eduze komfula
slides.lead: Umfula wawunika abantu ukudla, amakhaya nomsebenzi unyaka wonke.

blocks.text: Endulo abantu bokuqala lapha babengabazingeli-baqoqi ababehambahamba befuna ukudla. Ngokuhamba kwesikhathi bazinza baba **abalimi**, bakha amakhaya nemizi ngasosebeni lweNile.

items: Abalimi bakhulisa ukolweni nebhali ukwenza isinkwa, nemifino yokudla.
Babefuya izilwane ezinjengezinkomo, izimbuzi namadada.
Abantu babesebenzisa umhlanga womfula *i-papyrus* ukwenza izikebhe, amacansi nohlobo lokuqala lwephepha.
Amakhaya ayakhiwe ngezitini zodaka ezaziyoma ziqine elangeni.

media.alt: Imihlanga emide i-papyrus ekhula eduze kwamanzi nesikebhe esincane somhlanga.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='220' height='40' fill='#4a86b5'/><g stroke='#3f6b45' stroke-width='4' fill='none'><line x1='40' y1='120' x2='40' y2='44'/><line x1='58' y1='120' x2='58' y2='54'/><line x1='76' y1='120' x2='76' y2='40'/></g><g fill='#7a8b5a'><circle cx='40' cy='40' r='9'/><circle cx='58' cy='50' r='9'/><circle cx='76' cy='36' r='9'/></g><path d='M120 132 q30 -18 60 0 q-30 10 -60 0 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Yenza impilo yansuku zonke iphile. I-papyrus yigama elixhumanisayo elihle - yayikhula emfuleni futhi yayisetshenziswa ukwenza iphepha lokuqala, okuyilapho igama lethu elithi 'iphepha' livela khona. Izindlu zezitini zodaka zixhumana nalokho abafundi abangase bakwazi ngezinto zokwakha. Gcizelela ukuthi impilo yansuku zonke yayincike kangakanani emfuleni nasezikhukhuleni zawo.

slides.title: IGibhithe Elingenhla nelingezansi liyahlangana
slides.lead: Izingxenye ezimbili zeGibhithe zahlanganiswa ngaphansi kombusi oyedwa.

blocks.text: Ngenxa yokuthi iNile igeleza isuka eningizimu iye enyakatho, iGibhithe lalihlukaniswe laba yizindawo ezimbili. Ingxenye eseningizimu yayibizwa ngokuthi i-**Gibhithe Elingenhla** (Upper Egypt) kanti ingxenye esenyakatho, eduze kolwandle, yayibizwa ngokuthi i-**Gibhithe Elingezansi** (Lower Egypt). Lokhu kungase kuzwakale kuphambene, kodwa 'elingenhla' lisho phezulu emfuleni, eduze nalapho iqala khona.
Endulo lezi zindawo ezimbili zahlanganiswa zaba umbuso owodwa owawubuswa yinkosi eyodwa. Lokhu kwaqalisa uhla olude lwamakhosi aseGibhithe esiwabiza ngokuthi **ofaro** (pharaohs).

items: IGibhithe Elingenhla laliseningizimu, iGibhithe Elingezansi lalisenyakatho.
Zahlanganiswa zaba yizwe elilodwa ngaphansi kombusi oyedwa.
Inkosi yayigqoka umqhele okhethekile obukhombisa ukuthi ibusa zombili izindawo.

media.alt: Ibalazwe elilula elikhombisa iGibhithe Elingenhla eningizimu neGibhithe Elingezansi enyakatho lixhunywe yiNile.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 170' role='img'><rect width='200' height='170' fill='#e8d9a8'/><rect x='88' y='10' width='24' height='150' fill='#4a86b5'/><rect x='60' y='10' width='80' height='70' fill='#a8bcae' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='60' y='92' width='80' height='68' fill='#c8b89a' opacity='0.7'/><rect x='84' y='6' width='32' height='10' fill='#4a86b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sombulula ukudideka okuvamile: iGibhithe 'Elingenhla' liseningizimu ngoba liphakeme ngasemthonjeni womfula. Sebenzisa inkomba yokugeleza komfula ukukuchaza. Ukuhlangana kwezindawo ezimbili yisikhathi lapho iGibhithe laba khona umbuso owodwa. [SME] Izazi-mlando zibeka lokhu cishe ku-3000 BCE; gcina amagama ethi 'endulo' ngaphandle uma ufuna ukwethula usuku.

slides.title: Ufaro: inkosi nonkulunkulu
slides.lead: Ufaro wayengumuntu onamandla kunabo bonke kulo lonke iGibhithe.

blocks.text: Inkosi yaseGibhithe yayibizwa ngokuthi u-**faro** (pharaoh). Leli gama livela emagameni asendulo aseGibhithe athi *per-aa*, asho 'indlu enkulu'. Ufaro wayengumholi kahulumeni kanye nomholi wenkolo ngasikhathi sinye.

items: Abantu babekholelwa ukuthi ufaro wayengunkulunkulu obumbeke umuntu.
Wayengumnikazi womhlaba futhi eshaya imithetho.
Wayehola ibutho futhi ephethe ukwakhiwa kwamathempeli namaphiramidi.
Lapho ufaro efa, indodana yakhe ngokuvamile yayiba ngufaro olandelayo.

media.alt: Ikhanda likafaro ligqoke umqhele omude onemidwebo waseGibhithe.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 160 170' role='img'><rect width='160' height='170' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M56 60 q24 -40 48 0 v70 h-48 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/><g stroke='#4a86b5' stroke-width='6'><line x1='60' y1='70' x2='60' y2='128'/><line x1='72' y1='64' x2='72' y2='128'/><line x1='88' y1='64' x2='88' y2='128'/><line x1='100' y1='70' x2='100' y2='128'/></g><ellipse cx='80' cy='108' rx='22' ry='26' fill='#d8a878'/><circle cx='72' cy='104' r='3' fill='#3a2a1a'/><circle cx='88' cy='104' r='3' fill='#3a2a1a'/><path d='M74 118 q6 6 12 0' stroke='#3a2a1a' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ufaro wayehlanganisa inkosi, umholi kahulumeni nomholi wenkolo. Lokhu kuhlangana kombusi nonkulunkulu kwanika ufaro amandla amakhulu. 'Indlu enkulu' (per-aa) ekuqaleni yayisho isigodlo sasebukhosini kamuva yasho umbusi ngokwakhe. [SME] Eminye imithombo iphinde ithi amaHeberu asebenzisa igama elithi 'faro'; gcina incazelo ilula eBangeni 5 futhi ubambelele encazelweni ethi 'indlu enkulu'.

slides.title: Isimo somphakathi waseGibhithe
slides.lead: Umphakathi waseGibhithe wawufana nephiramidi: abantu abambalwa abanamandla phezulu, izisebenzi eziningi phansi.

blocks.heading: Ufaro
blocks.text: Phezulu impela, inkosi-nkulunkulu eyayibusa wonke umuntu nakho konke.

blocks.heading: Abapristi, ababhali nezikhulu
blocks.text: Abantu abafundile ababephatha amathempeli, begcina amarekhodi futhi besiza ufaro ukubusa.

blocks.heading: Abalimi, izingcweti nezisebenzi
blocks.text: Abantu abaningi abavamile ababekhulisa ukudla, benza izimpahla futhi bakha izakhiwo ezinkulu ezikhumbulekayo.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa isimo sephiramidi njengethuluzi lokukhumbula uhlelo lomphakathi - luvumelana nezakhiwo ezidumile ngazo. Ababhali babebalulekile: babekwazi ukufunda nokubhala, ngakho babegcina amarekhodi futhi benemisebenzi ekhethekile. Khombisa ukuthi iningi labantu babengabalimi nezisebenzi ezazisekela ngomsebenzi wazo wonke umuntu ongaphezu kwazo.

slides.title: Onkulunkulu nempilo yangemva kokufa
slides.lead: AmaGibhithe asendulo ayekholelwa konkulunkulu abaningi nasekuphileni ngemva kokufa.

blocks.text: AmaGibhithe ayekhonza **onkulunkulu nonkulunkulukazi abaningi**, ayekholelwa ukuthi babelawula ilanga, umfula, ukuvuna nezinye izingxenye zempilo. Abapristi abanamandla babenakekela amathempeli nemicimbi yenkolo.

Ayekholelwa ngokuqinile e**mpilweni yangemva kokufa** - impilo eqhubekayo ngemva kokufa. Ukuze balungiselele umzimba impilo yangemva kokufa, babewugcina ngokucophelela njenge-**mummy** (isidumbu esigciniwe). Lokhu kwakubiza, ngakho kwakukwazi kuphela abacebile, ikakhulukazi ofaro.

items: AmaGibhithe ayekholelwa ukuthi umzimba udinga ukugcinwa uphephile ukuze uphile ngemva kokufa.
Imizimba yayenziwa ama-mummy ibekwe emathuneni kanye nokudla nengcebo.
Inkolo namandla kafaro kwakuxhumene ngokuseduze.

media.alt: I-mummy egoqiweyo elele ngaphakathi kwebhokisi lomngcwabo elihlotshisiwe.

slides.notes: Phatha ama-mummy ngokulangazelela nangenhlonipho, hhayi njengento eyethusayo - chaza ukuthi kwakuyisenzo senkolo esibucayi sokunakekela abafileyo. Ukukholelwa empilweni yangemva kokufa yisizathu samaphiramidi nengcebo engaphakathi emathuneni, okuxhumana nezingqwembe ezilandelayo. Qaphela ukuthi inkolo yayisekela igunya likafaro.

slides.title: Amaphiramidi neSphinx
slides.lead: AmaGibhithe akha amathuna amakhulu etshe asamile nanamuhla.

blocks.text: AmaGibhithe akha **amaphiramidi** amakhulu etshe njengamathuna ofaro namakhosikazi abo. Ngaphakathi kwakunamakamelo okugcina, imihubhe efihliweyo neziphandla. I-mummy kafaro nengcebo yayibekwa ngaphakathi ukuze aphile ngemva kokufa.
Eduze kwamaphiramidi eGiza kumi i-**Sphinx**, isithombe esikhulu esinomzimba webhubesi nekhanda lenkosi. Sesime njengophawu lweGibhithe iminyaka eyizinkulungwane.

items: Amaphiramidi ayakhiwa ngamaqembu amakhulu ezingcweti ezinamakhono nezisebenzi.
Ingxenye enkulu yokwakha yayenzeka ngesikhathi sezikhukhula, lapho abalimi babengakwazi ukusebenza emasimini.
Amaphiramidi adume kunawo wonke aseGiza, eduze kweCairo yanamuhla.

media.alt: Amaphiramidi amabili amakhulu nesithombe seSphinx ehlane.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#e8d9a8'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#d8c48a'/><path d='M60 120 L110 40 L160 120 Z' fill='#c8a24a'/><path d='M150 120 L190 62 L230 120 Z' fill='#b7935a'/><g fill='#c8a24a'><rect x='20' y='104' width='40' height='16'/><path d='M18 104 q16 -22 30 0 Z'/></g><circle cx='28' cy='100' r='2' fill='#3a2a1a'/></svg>

slides.notes: Mangala ngobukhulu - lezi zakhiwa ngezandla, eminyakeni eyizinkulungwane eyadlula, futhi zisamile. Chaza ukuthi abalimi abavamile basiza ukuzakha ngesikhathi sesikhukhula, lapho amasimu abo ayengaphansi kwamanzi. I-Sphinx ixhumana namandla kafaro (amandla ebhubesi, ikhanda lenkosi). Gcina isimo somoya sokumangala ngempumelelo yase-Afrika.

slides.title: Ithuna likaTutankhamen
slides.lead: Ngo-1922 abahloli bathola ithuna eligcwele ingcebo likafaro osemncane.

blocks.text: U-**Tutankhamen** wayengufaro owaba yinkosi esengumfana futhi wafa esemncane. Iminyaka eyizinkulungwane ithuna lakhe lalilele lifihliwe lingathintwanga. Ngo-**1922** latholakala, lisagcwele ingcebo yegolide, isifonyo segolide nezinto zansuku zonke ezazingcwatshwe naye.

items: Ithuna lasifundisa okuningi ngendlela ofaro ababengcwatshwa ngayo.
Laligcwele igolide, ubucwebe, ifenisha nokudla kwempilo yangemva kokufa.
UTutankhamen manje ungomunye wofaro abadume kunabo bonke emhlabeni.

media.alt: Isifonyo segolide sokungcwaba sikafaro esinemidwebo eluhlaza okwesibhakabhaka.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 160 170' role='img'><rect width='160' height='170' fill='#2f2a3a'/><path d='M52 44 q28 -26 56 0 v40 q0 44 -28 62 q-28 -18 -28 -62 Z' fill='#e0b83a'/><path d='M52 44 q28 -26 56 0 v14 h-56 Z' fill='#4a86b5'/><g stroke='#4a86b5' stroke-width='4'><line x1='58' y1='58' x2='58' y2='96'/><line x1='102' y1='58' x2='102' y2='96'/></g><circle cx='70' cy='78' r='4' fill='#2f2a3a'/><circle cx='90' cy='78' r='4' fill='#2f2a3a'/><path d='M72 100 q8 6 16 0' stroke='#2f2a3a' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/><rect x='74' y='112' width='12' height='18' fill='#4a86b5'/></svg>

slides.notes: Ukutholakala kwango-1922 kwezazi-mivubukulo kuyajabulisa kubafundi - ingcebo yangempela efihliweyo. Kubalulekile kwizazi-mlando ngoba amathuna amaningi asebukhosini aphangwa endulo, kodwa elikaTutankhamen laliphelele cishe, ngakho lingumthombo ocebile wobufakazi ngezinkolelo nezinto zansuku zonke. [SME] Ithuna latholwa yiqembu likaHoward Carter ngo-1922; engeza igama lakhe uma ufuna ukubalula isazi-mivubukulo.

slides.title: Ama-hieroglyphs: ukubhala ngezithombe
slides.lead: AmaGibhithe asungula uhlobo lokubhala olwalusebenzisa izithombe nezimpawu.

blocks.text: Njengoba ukuhweba kwakhula, amaGibhithe ayedinga ukugcina amarekhodi alokho ayekuthenga nakuthengisa. Athuthukisa uhlobo lombhalo wezithombe olubizwa ngokuthi ama-**hieroglyphs**, lapho isithombe ngasinye esincane noma uphawu lwalumele umsindo noma umqondo.

items: Ama-hieroglyphs ayeqoshwa ezindongeni zamathempeli futhi abhalwe kwi-papyrus.
Ababhali abaqeqeshwe ngokukhethekile ababizwa ngokuthi *ababhali* (scribes) bafunda ukuwafunda nokuwabhala.
Lo mbhalo wasiza amaGibhithe ukurekhoda umlando wawo, imithetho nezindaba.

media.alt: Umugqa wezimpawu ze-hieroglyph zaseGibhithe: iso, inyoni, imigqa yamanzi nonyawo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 120' role='img'><rect width='240' height='120' fill='#e8d9b8'/><rect x='10' y='10' width='220' height='100' fill='none' stroke='#b7935a' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M30 60 q20 -18 40 0 q-20 18 -40 0 Z' fill='none' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='50' cy='60' r='6' fill='#7a5a3a'/><path d='M92 46 q22 -6 34 8 l-10 4 q-8 12 -24 8 Z' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g stroke='#4a86b5' stroke-width='3' fill='none'><path d='M150 52 q6 -6 12 0 q6 6 12 0'/><path d='M150 64 q6 -6 12 0 q6 6 12 0'/></g><path d='M200 44 v28 h16' stroke='#7a5a3a' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/></svg>

slides.notes: Xhuma ukubhala nokuhweba nokugcina amarekhodi - isidingo esibonakalayo saholela ekusungulweni okukhulu. Chaza 'umbhali' njengomuntu owayenomsebenzi okhethekile wokubhala, nokuthi ukufunda nokubhala kwanika ababhali indawo ebalulekile emphakathini. Uma isikhathi sivuma, vumela abafundi basungule uphawu-sithombe lwegama labo.

slides.title: Izipho ezivela eGibhithe lasendulo
slides.lead: Imibono evela eGibhithe lasendulo yasiza abantu bakamuva emhlabeni wonke.

blocks.heading: Izibalo
blocks.text: AmaGibhithe adala uhlelo lwezinombolo lokuqala futhi alusebenzisa ukukala umhlaba nokuhlela izakhiwo zawo.

blocks.heading: Ezokwelapha
blocks.text: Odokotela baseGibhithe babelungisa amathambo aphukile, bathunge amanxeba, belaphe izifo ngamakhambi baze basebenze namazinyo.

blocks.heading: Ukubhala nephepha
blocks.text: Umbhalo wabo wezithombe 'nephepha' le-papyrus kwakuphakathi kwezindlela zokuqala zokugcina amarekhodi.

slides.notes: Veza ukuqhubeka nokushintsha: imibono yasendulo isabalulekile nanamuhla. AmaGibhithe akala amasimu futhi aqhamuka nendlela yokwakha amaphiramidi aqondile, alinganayo esebenzisa izibalo. Ulwazi lwawo ngomzimba lwaluvela ngokwengxenye ekulungiseleleni ama-mummy. Gcizelela ukuthi le mpumelelo yavela emphakathini wase-Afrika.

slides.title: IGibhithe lasendulo ngokuhamba kwesikhathi

events.label: IGibhithe Elingenhla nelingezansi lihlanganiswa ngaphansi kukafaro oyedwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa uhlu lwesikhathi ukubukeza sonke isifundo ngokulandelana. Chaza ukuthi izinsuku ze-'BCE' zinzima eBangeni 5, ngakho sisebenzisa 'endulo' nokuthi 'cishe eminyakeni engu-5000 eyadlula'. Cela abafundi baphinde baxoxe indaba yeGibhithe besebenzisa uhlu lwesikhathi njengomhlahlandlela. [SME] Lungisa ubeke izinsuku ezinembile ze-BCE (ukuhlangana cishe ngo-3000 BCE, amaphiramidi eGiza cishe ngo-2500 BCE) uma ikilasi lakho liwasebenzisa.

slides.title: Esikufundile
slides.lead: IGibhithe lasendulo laliyimpucuko enkulu yase-Afrika eyabunjwa yiNile, eyayibuswa ofaro futhi ekhunjulwa ngamaphiramidi ayo nombhalo wezithombe.

blocks.text: **Umfula iNile** wanika amaGibhithe amanzi, ukudla nendlela yokuhamba. U-**faro** wayebusa njengenkosi nonkulunkulu, esizwa abapristi nababhali. AmaGibhithe ayekholelwa **konkulunkulu abaningi** nasekuphileni ngemva kokufa, futhi akha **amaphiramidi** njengamathuna. Asungula umbhalo wama-**hieroglyph** futhi enza ukutholakala kwezinto ezintsha ezibalweni nasezokwelapha okusabalulekile nanamuhla.

blocks.question: Chaza izindlela ezimbili umfula iNile owawubaluleke ngazo kumaGibhithe asendulo.
Wayengubani ufaro, futhi kungani wayenamandla kangaka?
Bala into eyodwa amaGibhithe asendulo awakha noma awasungula, uphinde usho ukuthi kungani yayibalulekile.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokuxhuma yonke imicu ibuyele eNile - ijografi yenza impucuko yakwazi ukuba khona. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu emsebenzini obhaliwe noma engxoxweni yekilasi; ukwabiwa kwamamaki kulandela isitayela seSigaba Esiphakathi se-CAPS. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi lena yayiyimpucuko yase-Afrika, uxhuma isihloko nesifundo somlando wase-Afrika.
